name: Impossible Lasagne Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sm. curd creamed cottage cheese
1 lb Gr. beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10x1 1/2" pie plate or an 8x8" square baking dish.
3. In the prepared pan, layer cottage cheese and Parmesan cheese.
4. Mix cooked beef with 1 cup of mozzarella, oregano, basil, and tomato paste. Spread evenly over the top.
5. In a blender, beat milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper for 15 seconds on high speed, or whisk until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
8. Return to oven for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Let cool for 5 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with fresh parsley.
Note: For half the recipe, use 1 quart square or round casserole dish. Divide ingredient amounts in half and decrease blending time to 10 seconds in blender or 30 seconds with whisk/beater. First bake time should be reduced to 25-30 minutes for high altitudes. No adjustments are necessary.
